overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a rain-slicked neon-lit commercial district at night. The player moves along a sidewalk past construction barriers and holographic advertisements, eventually crossing a busy intersection with a crowd of pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with construction barriers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, passing illuminated advertisements and construction barriers

entered.detail: large illuminated red billboard with white corporate logo and text
temporary construction blockades with orange and white striping
low orange safety railing along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked cyberpunk city sidewalk at night, dominated by neon lighting and towering glass skyscrapers. The camera moves forward past orange construction barriers on the left and a large red corporate billboard on the right, with holographic advertisements visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with black iron fencing approaching intersection

events.description: passing from construction barrier zone into area with black metal fencing on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, approaching an urban intersection with increasing pedestrian activity

notable_agents.action: man in white tank top standing near vending machine, then walking away

entered.detail: tall black metal fence running along the right side of the sidewalk
street sign indicating Watson Bridge direction
corporate signage for Arasaka visible on distant building

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a section of sidewalk bordered by a black wrought-iron fence on the right, with the construction barriers now behind. The camera continues forward past palm tree planters and street vendors, with the Watson Bridge sign becoming visible on the left as the intersection approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection crosswalk with yellow stripes

events.description: approaching crosswalk and waiting with pedestrian group for traffic signal
crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk with a crowd of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk edge then crossing the street with a group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of four pedestrians waiting at crosswalk then crossing together

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes
open urban plaza space with multiple building facades visible

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens into a wide urban intersection, with the camera approaching and crossing a yellow-striped crosswalk. The black fence and railings fall away as the scene opens to the plaza, where the camera joins a group of pedestrians crossing the wet asphalt under the glow of towering neon advertisements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk district that transitions from a narrow, obstructed sidewalk into a wide, bustling urban intersection. It begins by gliding past orange construction barriers and a large red corporate billboard, with towering glass skyscrapers and distant holograms framing the night sky. As the camera moves forward, the construction zone gives way to a black wrought-iron fence and palm tree planters, while a sign for Watson Bridge emerges on the left to signal the approaching crossing. The scene then opens up as the fence and railings fall away, leading the camera across a yellow-striped crosswalk. Finally, the perspective merges with a crowd of pedestrians crossing the wet asphalt under the intense glow of towering neon advertisements.
